# criblio_group_system_settings (Data Source)

GroupSystemSettings DataSource

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "criblio_group_system_settings" "my_groupsystemsettings" {
  group_id = "defaultHybrid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) The hybrid worker group or edge fleet to which this instance belongs. Defaults to 'defaultHybrid'.

### Read-Only

- `api` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--api))
- `backups` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--backups))
